title: Interpret Map Monitor Message Panel Robot And AGV Status Items
summary: Use the Map Monitor message panel on the right side of the interface to identify the robot count and AGV fault-related items shown in the training slide.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing the Map Monitor interface to identify the message panel items documented in the training source, including robot counts, AGV fault-related items, disconnected AGV count, fault detail inspection area, locate faulted AGV item, and the E-stop-related item.
not_for: Do not use for corrective action, fault recovery, or control actuation because the source only supports identifying displayed items.
Do not use to infer meanings, actions, or corrective steps beyond the items explicitly shown in the source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Visually identify the documented Map Monitor message panel items shown in the source.

safety_notes: The source references an 'E stop the system' item, but this runbook only covers identifying its presence.
No safe actuation procedure for the E-stop-related item is provided in this packet.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Map Monitor interface
Visual access to the message panel on the right side
Training slide or screenshot showing the documented panel items

access_required: Access to the Map Monitor interface
system_preconditions: The Map Monitor interface is visible.
The right-side message panel can be viewed.
external_references: Training slide or screenshot showing the documented panel items

visual_references.description: Training slide showing the Map Monitor message panel with robot and AGV status counts, fault visibility, disconnected AGV count, fault inspection reference, locate faulted AGV item, and E-stop reference.

steps.title: Locate the Map Monitor message panel
steps.purpose: Orient the user to the correct interface area before identifying individual items.
steps.instruction: Locate the Map Monitor message panel on the right side of the interface.
steps.expected_result: The right-side message panel is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: A right-side panel matching the training slide is visible.
steps.failure_condition: The message panel is not visible or cannot be matched to the training slide.

actions.label: Find right-side panel
actions.exact_action: Locate the Map Monitor message panel on the right side of the interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Map Monitor message panel on the right side of the interface.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Map Monitor message panel is not visible.
Escalate if the displayed panel cannot be matched to the documented interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide shows 'Map Monitor Message Panel' on the right side with robot counts, AGV fault items, disconnected AGV count, fault inspection, locate faulted AGV, and E-stop.

steps.title: Identify robot count items
steps.purpose: Confirm the robot count metrics documented in the source.
steps.instruction: Identify the displayed robot count items labeled 'Count of active Robots' and 'Count of Robots charging.'
steps.expected_result: Both robot count labels are identified in the panel.
steps.healthy_condition: The panel shows both 'Count of active Robots' and 'Count of Robots charging.'
steps.failure_condition: One or both robot count items are not visible or cannot be matched to the documented labels.

actions.label: Identify active robot count
actions.exact_action: Identify the displayed item labeled 'Count of active Robots.'

actions.label: Identify charging robot count
actions.exact_action: Identify the displayed item labeled 'Count of Robots charging.'

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The robot count items labeled 'Count of active Robots' and 'Count of Robots charging.'

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the documented robot count items cannot be matched to the interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Map Monitor message panel metrics include count of active robots and count of robots charging.
OCR lists 'Count of active Robots' and 'Count of Robots charging' in the Map Monitor message panel.

steps.title: Check for AGV faults drop-down
steps.purpose: Confirm whether the panel includes the AGV fault display item documented in the source.
steps.instruction: Check whether the panel includes a drop-down to show AGV faults.
steps.expected_result: The AGV faults drop-down item is identified if present.
steps.healthy_condition: A panel item matching the documented AGV faults drop-down is visible.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV faults drop-down item is not visible or cannot be matched to the documented label.

actions.label: Check AGV faults drop-down
actions.exact_action: Check whether the panel includes a drop-down to show AGV faults.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The item described as a drop-down to show AGV faults.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the documented AGV faults item cannot be matched to the interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: AGV fault-related message panel items include a dropdown to show AGV faults, disconnected AGV count, fault detail inspection, and locate faulted AGV.
OCR text includes 'drop down to show AGV faults'.

steps.title: Identify disconnected AGV count
steps.purpose: Confirm the disconnected AGV count item documented in the source.
steps.instruction: Identify the displayed 'Count of AGVs disconnected' item.
steps.expected_result: The disconnected AGV count item is identified.
steps.healthy_condition: The panel shows the item labeled 'Count of AGVs disconnected.'
steps.failure_condition: The disconnected AGV count item is not visible or cannot be matched to the documented label.

actions.label: Identify disconnected AGV count
actions.exact_action: Identify the displayed 'Count of AGVs disconnected' item.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The item labeled 'Count of AGVs disconnected.'

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the disconnected AGV count item cannot be matched to the interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: AGV fault-related message panel items include a dropdown to show AGV faults, disconnected AGV count, fault detail inspection, and locate faulted AGV.
OCR lists 'Count of AGVs disconnected' in the Map Monitor message panel.

steps.title: Inspect fault detail reference area
steps.purpose: Confirm the panel area or control referenced for viewing fault details.
steps.instruction: Inspect the panel for the area or control described as inspection to view details of fault.
steps.expected_result: The fault detail inspection area or control is identified.
steps.healthy_condition: A panel area or control matching the documented fault detail inspection reference is visible.
steps.failure_condition: The fault detail inspection area or control is not visible or cannot be matched to the documented wording.

actions.label: Inspect fault detail reference
actions.exact_action: Inspect the panel for the area or control described as inspection to view details of fault.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The area or control described as inspection to view details of fault.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the fault detail inspection area cannot be matched to the interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: AGV fault-related message panel items include a dropdown to show AGV faults, disconnected AGV count, fault detail inspection, and locate faulted AGV.
OCR text includes 'inspection to view details of fault'.

steps.title: Identify locate faulted AGV item
steps.purpose: Confirm the presence of the locate faulted AGV item documented in the source.
steps.instruction: Identify the control or item labeled 'Locate Faulted AGV.'
steps.expected_result: The locate faulted AGV item is identified.
steps.healthy_condition: A control or item matching 'Locate Faulted AGV' is visible.
steps.failure_condition: The locate faulted AGV item is not visible or cannot be matched to the documented label.

actions.label: Identify locate faulted AGV
actions.exact_action: Identify the control or item labeled 'Locate Faulted AGV.'

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The control or item labeled 'Locate Faulted AGV.'

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the locate faulted AGV item cannot be matched to the interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: AGV fault-related message panel items include a dropdown to show AGV faults, disconnected AGV count, fault detail inspection, and locate faulted AGV.

steps.title: Note E-stop system item if visible
steps.purpose: Record the presence of the E-stop-related item referenced in the source without performing any actuation.
steps.instruction: Note that the panel also references 'E stop the system,' and record that this item is present if visible.
steps.expected_result: The E-stop-related item is noted as present if visible.
steps.healthy_condition: An item matching 'E stop the system' is visible and recorded as present.
steps.failure_condition: The E-stop-related item is not visible or cannot be matched to the documented wording.

actions.label: Note E-stop item
actions.exact_action: Note that the panel also references 'E stop the system,' and record that this item is present if visible.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The item referenced as 'E stop the system.'

stop_or_escalate_if: Do not actuate the E-stop-related item based on this runbook.
Escalate if clarification is needed on the function or safe use of the E-stop-related item.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Map Monitor message panel slide references an E-stop the system item, indicating an E-stop-related control or safety reference is present.
OCR includes 'E stop the system' as an item shown on the slide for the Map Monitor message panel.

success_criteria: The user can identify the Map Monitor message panel on the right side of the interface.
The user can identify the documented robot count items.
The user can identify the documented AGV fault-related items, disconnected AGV count, fault detail inspection reference, locate faulted AGV item, and E-stop-related item if visible.
healthy_conditions: The right-side message panel is visible and matches the training slide.
The panel items can be matched to the documented labels from the source.
failure_conditions: The Map Monitor message panel is not visible.
The documented items cannot be matched to the interface.
The user attempts to infer meanings, actions, or corrective steps beyond the source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the Map Monitor message panel is not visible or the documented items cannot be matched to the interface.
Escalate if clarification is needed because the source does not provide corrective actions or operating procedures for these items.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Map Monitor message panel on the right side, including robot counts, AGV fault items, disconnected AGV count, fault detail inspection reference, locate faulted AGV item, and E-stop reference.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Slide shows 'Map Monitor Message Panel' on the right side with robot counts, AGV fault items, disconnected AGV count, fault inspection, locate faulted AGV, and E-stop.

missing_details: The source does not provide corrective actions for any identified panel item.
The source does not provide commands, thresholds, or operating limits for the displayed counts.
The source does not provide a safe actuation procedure for the E-stop-related item.
The source does not define role boundaries beyond operator-level identification of the displayed items.
